query:
SELECT 
    time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS bucket,
    slave_id,
    channel,
    SUM(value) AS value
FROM channel_pulse_log
WHERE timestamp > '{{{ msg.payload.dateStart }}}'
  AND timestamp < '{{{ msg.payload.dateEnd }}}'
  AND (slave_id, channel) IN {{{ msg.payload.devices }}}
  AND value < 20000
GROUP BY bucket, slave_id, channel
ORDER BY bucket, slave_id, channel;

query:
SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', cr.timestamp)    AS timestamp,
  cr.slave_id,
  AVG(cr.value * 
    COALESCE(
      -- Extract multiplier from slave name using regex
      -- Match patterns like "x400A", "x400.28A", "x400" but NOT "x400V"
      CASE 
        WHEN s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)[^V]' OR s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)$'
        THEN (regexp_match(s.name, 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float
        ELSE 1
      END,
      1
    )
  )          AS value,
  AVG(cr.value_reactive * 
    COALESCE(
      -- Apply same multiplier to reactive power
      CASE 
        WHEN s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)[^V]' OR s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)$'
        THEN (regexp_match(s.name, 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float
        ELSE 1
      END,
      1
    )
  ) AS value_reactive
FROM consumption_realtime cr
JOIN slaves s
  ON cr.slave_id = s.id
WHERE
      -- start *after* the bucket containing last_ts
      cr.timestamp >  ('{{{ msg.payload.last_energy_ts }}}'::timestamptz
                       + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
  AND cr.timestamp <= ('{{{ msg.payload.last_energy_ts }}}'::timestamptz
                       + INTERVAL '1 hour')
  AND (cr.value / 3.0) <= (
    CASE COALESCE(s.clamp_type::text, '0')
      WHEN '0' THEN 50
      WHEN '1' THEN 100
      WHEN '2' THEN 400
      WHEN '3' THEN 1000
      WHEN '4' THEN 2000
      WHEN '5' THEN 1600
      WHEN '6' THEN 1000
      ELSE 0
    END * 220
  )
  AND s.type = 'three_phase_sensor'
GROUP BY timestamp, cr.slave_id
ORDER BY timestamp, cr.slave_id;

name: function 11

query:
WITH raw_ts AS (
  -- 1) use exactly what the cloud sent, or fall back to the first 2023+ reading
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{{ msg.payload.last_water_ts }}}','')::timestamptz,
      (
        SELECT MIN(timestamp)
          FROM channel_pulse_log
         WHERE timestamp > '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'
           AND channel   = 1
      )
    ) AS start_ts
),
channel_info AS (
  -- 2) lookup your per-slave multiplier
  SELECT
    slave_id,
    MAX(
      COALESCE(
        (regexp_match(name, 'x([0-9]+\\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float,
        1
      )
    ) AS multiplier
  FROM channels
  WHERE channel = 1
    AND type    = 'flow_sensor'
    AND slave_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY slave_id
),
bounds AS (
  -- 3) from that start_ts, either take a full hour (if there's data),
  --    or jump to the end of the very next non‐empty 5m bucket
  SELECT
    r.start_ts,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
          FROM channel_pulse_log c
          JOIN channel_info ci ON c.slave_id = ci.slave_id
         WHERE c.timestamp >  r.start_ts
           AND c.timestamp <= r.start_ts + INTERVAL '1 hour'
           AND c.channel   = 1
           AND c.value     > 0
           AND c.value     < 10000
      )
      THEN r.start_ts + INTERVAL '1 hour'
      ELSE (
        SELECT MIN(time_bucket('5 minutes', c2.timestamp) + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
          FROM channel_pulse_log c2
          JOIN channel_info ci2 ON c2.slave_id = ci2.slave_id
         WHERE c2.timestamp > r.start_ts
           AND c2.channel   = 1
           AND c2.value     > 0
           AND c2.value     < 10000
      )
    END AS end_ts
  FROM raw_ts r
),
main_data AS (
  -- 4) aggregate _all_ pulses in that (start_ts, end_ts] window
  SELECT
    time_bucket('5 minutes', c.timestamp)  AS bucket_start,
    c.slave_id,
    SUM(c.value)                            AS sum_value,
    (SUM(c.value) * ci.multiplier) / 1000   AS value
  FROM channel_pulse_log c
  JOIN channel_info    ci ON c.slave_id = ci.slave_id
  JOIN bounds          b  ON TRUE
  WHERE
        c.timestamp >  b.start_ts
    AND c.timestamp <= b.end_ts
    AND c.channel   = 1
    AND c.value     > 0
    AND c.value     < 10000
  GROUP BY bucket_start, c.slave_id, ci.multiplier
)
-- 5) return exactly one row _and_ use end_ts as the returned timestamp
SELECT
  (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) AS timestamp,
  slave_id,
  sum_value,
  value,
  1                            AS channel
FROM main_data
ORDER BY timestamp DESC, slave_id
LIMIT 1;

query:
WITH LastTimestamp AS (
  SELECT MAX(timestamp) AS max_timestamp
  FROM channel_pulse_log
),
TimeDiff AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    channel,
    value,
    slave_id,
    reading,
    LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id, channel ORDER BY timestamp) AS prev_timestamp,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (timestamp - LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id, channel ORDER BY timestamp))) AS time_diff_seconds
  FROM channel_pulse_log
  WHERE
    channel = 1
    AND timestamp >= (SELECT max_timestamp - INTERVAL '15 minutes' FROM LastTimestamp)
    AND timestamp <= (SELECT max_timestamp FROM LastTimestamp)
),
Outliers AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    channel,
    value,
    slave_id,
    reading,
    time_diff_seconds,
    (time_diff_seconds * 3) AS max_allowable_value
  FROM TimeDiff
  WHERE
    value > (time_diff_seconds * 3)
    AND value > 10
),
UpdatedRows AS (
  UPDATE channel_pulse_log cpl
  SET value = 0
  FROM Outliers
  WHERE
    cpl.timestamp = Outliers.timestamp
    AND cpl.slave_id = Outliers.slave_id
    AND cpl.channel = Outliers.channel
    AND cpl.value = Outliers.value
    AND cpl.reading = Outliers.reading
  RETURNING cpl.slave_id
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS affected_rows,
  ARRAY_AGG(slave_id) AS affected_slave_ids
FROM UpdatedRows;

name: function 30
function 30

query:
SELECT 
    c.slave_id,
    c.channel,
    c.name AS channel_name,
    s.name AS slave_name,
    MAX(cpl.timestamp) AS last_reading
FROM 
    channels c
LEFT JOIN 
    channel_pulse_log cpl ON c.slave_id = cpl.slave_id AND c.channel = cpl.channel
LEFT JOIN 
    slaves s ON c.slave_id = s.id
WHERE 
    c.name LIKE 'Hidr.%'
  AND c.slave_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    c.slave_id, c.channel, c.name, s.name
HAVING 
    MAX(cpl.timestamp) < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
    OR MAX(cpl.timestamp) IS NULL;

SELECT 
    s.id AS slave_id,
    s.name AS slave_name,
    MAX(cr.timestamp) AS last_reading
FROM 
    slaves s
LEFT JOIN 
    consumption_realtime cr ON s.id = cr.slave_id
WHERE 
    s.type = 'three_phase_sensor'
GROUP BY 
    s.id, s.name
HAVING 
    MAX(cr.timestamp) < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
    OR MAX(cr.timestamp) IS NULL;

SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM (
    SELECT
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS timestamp,
        AVG(value) AS value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp)
) AS hourly_data
GROUP BY
    day
ORDER BY
    total_consumption_kwh ASC
LIMIT 1;
